subject: skills/leash_for_hooks — pre-existing functions exceed McCabe budget after D-003
principal: After D-003 flipped the audit budget from LOC to McCabe cyclomatic complexity (≤10 per function, ≤30 cumulative per module), two violators surfaced: collectors/hook_config.py:_walk_settings (CC=12, exceeds per-function ≤10; module cumulative 35 exceeds ≤30) and resolvers/data_point.py:resolve (CC=11, exceeds per-function ≤10). The functions worked correctly — they were authored under the old LOC budget — but exceeded the new structural budget D-003 established as the audit surface's truth.
interest: skills/leash_for_hooks/verify.py reported 2 fail / 19 self-checks until refactored. SDLC pipeline gate (verify.py exit code) stayed red. Other skills that import the canonical audit module inherit the same surface, so similar violators may appear in claim_audit / regime_audit / leash_for_slash_commands / leash_for_symphony as their verifiers tighten.
payoff: Refactor each violator under McCabe ≤10/function and ≤30/module by structural compression — centralize repeated type-guard logic into a single helper instead of branch-shifting across split helpers. Specifically: (1) resolvers/data_point.py:resolve — split target validation, datasets-dir check, and per-jsonl scan into separate helpers. (2) collectors/hook_config.py:_walk_settings — define `_safe(x, t)` that returns `x if isinstance(x, t) else t()`, then walk the nested JSON without per-level isinstance branches. The latter is the load-bearing technique: per-function splits alone shifted CC between functions but added base-1s and didn't reduce module-cumulative; centralized type-guarding collapses the guard branches into one CC=2 helper.

closure.evidence: d9b55a7 + 5384eec — d9b55a7 split per-function violators (resolve into 3 helpers; _walk_settings into 3 helpers including _walk_event_matchers/_walk_inner_hooks). That move closed per-function but kept hook_config.py module-cumulative at 34 (was 35), still over ≤30. 5384eec applied structural compression: introduced `_safe(x, t)` (CC=2) at module scope, deleted both intermediate split helpers, rewrote `_walk_settings` (CC=6) using `_safe` at every nesting level. Final radon: hook_config.py module CC 28, max function CC 6. verify.py: 19 self-checks, 0 failures.
